articles.description: Wisconsin center Jake Renfro suffered what school officials described as a lower-body injury in practice, putting his status for the start of the season in question.
articles.headline: Wisconsin center Renfro in question for opener with injury

images.name: Deion Sanders announces bladder cancer battle
images.caption: Colorado coach Deion Sanders and his medical crew reveal that he battled and beat bladder cancer.

articles.description: After a recent cancer scare, Colorado coach Deion Sanders says he's feeling "healthy and vibrant" ahead of his team's season opener against Georgia Tech on Aug. 29 in Boulder.
articles.headline: 'Healthy, vibrant' Sanders expects Colorado to 'win differently'

images.name: Arch Manning [1296x729]
images.caption: Arch Manning now has the fifth-shortest odds to be the No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL draft after his grandfather's comments on Thursday.

images.name: Jacob Misiorowski [1296x729]
images.caption: Jacob Misiorowski's odds to win NL Rookie of the Year have fallen from -220 to +900.

images.name: Dak Prescott of Dallas Cowboys [608x342]
images.caption: The Cowboys won seven games last year, and sportsbooks aren't too keen on them doing much better this season.

images.name: Should Arch Manning stay at Texas beyond this season?
images.caption: The "Get Up" crew breaks down Arch Manning's path to the NFL and debates whether he should stay at Texas after this season.

articles.description: Arch Manning's odds to be the No. 1 pick in the 2026 NFL draft drastically shifted after Archie Manning said his grandson would stay at Texas.
articles.headline: Betting buzz: Manning no longer favorite to go No. 1 in 2026 NFL draft

articles.description: Boise State, Colorado State and Utah State filed an updated lawsuit arguing the Mountain West and commissioner Gloria Nevarez willfully disregarded the league's bylaws by "intentionally and fraudulently" depriving the schools of their membership rights.
articles.headline: Boise State, Colorado State, Utah State sue Mountain West

articles.description: It's time for a new season of "College GameDay" on ESPN! Check out the event hub page for weekly site details, recaps and other information.
articles.headline: Where is 'College GameDay'? 2025 schedule, locations, recaps

images.name: Garrett Nussmeier of the LSU Tigers warms up before a game against the Baylor Bears in the Kinder's Texas Bowl at NRG Stadium on December 31, 2024 in Houston, Texas. [600x400]
images.alt: Garrett Nussmeier of the LSU Tigers warms up before a game against the Baylor Bears in the Kinder's Texas Bowl at NRG Stadium on December 31, 2024 in Houston, Texas.

images.name: Kelly: QB Nussmeier's run game will be crucial to LSU's success
images.caption: The SEC Now crew delves into Garrett Nussmeier's potential on the run and the Tigers' new approach, specifically to their high-stakes opener against Clemson.

articles.description: LSU quarterback Garrett Nussmeier is dealing with patellar tendinitis in his knee after aggravating the issue in practice this week, according to coach Brian Kelly.
articles.headline: LSU QB Garrett Nussmeier dealing with patellar tendinitis

videos.description: Ohio State's Parris Campbell gets the pass from J.T. Barrett and speeds downfield for the 74-yard touchdown.
videos.headline: Campbell motors downfield for the long TD

videos.description: After trailing at the half, J.T. Barrett takes over in the second half and finishes the game with 304 yards in the air and four total touchdowns, including a score on the ground to lead the Buckeyes past the Hoosiers 49-21.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (OSU pulls away in the second half) 2017/8/31 ESHEET ENHL

videos.headline: OSU pulls away in the second half

videos.description: The Buckeyes overcome a first-half deficit with a stellar performance from J.T. Barrett and freshman RB J.K. Dobbins combining for 25 yards in his debut, rolling on for a 49-21 win over Indiana.
videos.headline: OSU survives in opener

videos.description: Indiana's Simmie Cobbs Jr. uses one hand and tip-toes along the sideline to make the 11-yard catch.
videos.headline: Cobbs Jr. makes the great one-handed grab

videos.description: Indiana's Ian Thomas drags his feet to complete the catch to give the Hoosiers a 7-3 lead.
videos.headline: Indiana takes lead over OSU

videos.description: Ian Thomas' catch is initially ruled incomplete, but replays show he dragged his foot to complete the 18-yard pass.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana scores first TD on replay review) 2017/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana scores first TD on replay review

videos.description: Ohio State's Jordan Fuller gets the interception off of the tipped pass and returns it 40 yards.
videos.headline: OSU's defense comes up big in the red zone

videos.description: Indiana's defense forces Ohio State to kick a field goal after stopping the Buckeyes on 3rd-and-goal.
videos.headline: Indiana's defense come up big in the red zone

videos.description: Indiana's Simmie Cobbs Jr. climbs the ladder to go over the defender to make the 8-yard touchdown reception.
videos.headline: Indiana scores second touchdown against Ohio State

videos.description: Ohio State's Antonio Williams runs into the end zone for the 1-yard touchdown.
videos.headline: Ohio State's Williams muscles into the end zone

videos.description: Simmie Cobbs Jr. continues his strong first-half performance with a leaping grab in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana's Cobbs caps off TD drive) 2017/0/8/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana's Cobbs caps off TD drive

videos.description: Simmie Cobbs Jr. has 98 yards and a touchdown, as well as two one-handed catches, to fuel Indiana to a 14-13 lead over Ohio State at halftime.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Indiana in lead at the half) 2017/8/31 ESHEET ENHL

videos.headline: Indiana in lead at the half

videos.description: Ohio State's Parris Campbell caps off a 28-yard catch by leaping over the Indiana defender.
videos.headline: OSU's Campbell leaps over the defender

videos.description: Ohio State's J.T. Barrett goes two yards to give the Buckeyes their first lead since the first quarter.
videos.headline: Barrett keeps it himself for the TD

videos.description: Parris Campbell finds open space after a catch in the flat and rumbles to a long touchdown for the Buckeyes.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OSU's Campbell jets 74 yards for score) 2017/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: OSU's Campbell jets 74 yards for score

videos.description: Indiana's Simmie Cobbs Jr. makes another incredible one-handed catch.
videos.headline: Cobbs Jr makes his second one-handed catch

videos.description: Ohio State's J.T. Barrett is sacked by Indiana's Robert McCray III in the final play of the first half.
videos.headline: Barrett sacked to end first half

videos.description: Ohio State's J.K. Dobbins spins and breaks free for the 26-yard rush against Indiana.
videos.headline: Ohio State's Dobbins spins away from Indiana

videos.description: Ohio State's Robert Landers scoops up what would have been a fumble, but the ball was called an incomplete pass.
videos.headline: Ohio State lineman almost takes a fumble to the house

videos.description: After having a scoop-and-score call overturned, Indiana marches downfield and responds with a two-yard touchdown pass to Ian Thomas.
videos.headline: Indiana caps off drive with 2-yard TD

videos.description: Ohio State's Johnnie Dixon speeds downfield for a 59-yard touchdown to put the Buckeyes up two scores.
videos.headline: OSU breaks free for another long TD

videos.description: Ohio State's J.T. Barrett finds Binjimen Victor in the endzone for the 11-yard touchdown and a commanding 42-21 lead.
videos.headline: Barrett helps extend lead for the Buckeyes

videos.description: Ohio State's Denzel Ward intercepts Indiana's Richard Lagow to help show off the Buckeyes' dominance in their season opener.
videos.headline: Ohio State flexes with another INT

videos.description: Ohio State's Antonio Williams flies into the end zone to pad Ohio State's lead over Indiana.
videos.headline: OSU further extends lead

videos.description: Lee Corso's pick is "strictly business" as he selects Ohio State to knock off Indiana.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Corso's pick: Ohio State-Indiana) 2017/08/31 CGD

videos.headline: Corso's pick: Ohio State-Indiana

videos.description: Former Indiana coach and College GameDay analyst Lee Corso is awarded with honors after the first quarter of the Hoosiers' home opener against Ohio State.
videos.headline: Lee Corso honored after first quarter

videos.description: Indiana head coach Tom Allen talks about his team finishing the game and how he wants more than a 'moral victory' against Ohio State.
videos.headline: Indiana's Tom Allen wants Hoosiers to 'finish the game'

videos.description: Ohio State head coach Urban Meyer talks about 'special' freshman running back J.K. Dobbins and the adjustments made at halftime.
videos.headline: Urban Meyer talks about 'special' freshman running back

videos.description: Ohio State's J.T. Barrett  breaks down the mental adjustments he made between halves against Indiana.
videos.headline: Barrett talks 'keeping calm' during first half against Indiana
